summary: Seeded envelope. A dispatch brain that lets independent taxi operators beat Uber surge pricing in their metro. Live web research has not run yet; invoke 'npm run research -- --id mobility_dispatch_brain_for_taxis' to populate citations.

dead_saas_matches.rationale: Risk profile overlaps Adept AI (Commoditization by foundational models; no proprietary data moat; capital intensity).
Risk profile overlaps Jasper AI (Rapid commoditization by GPT-4/Claude; no retention loop; no workflow moat).
